## ✨ Feature Request

**Is your request related to a problem?**
A clear and concise description of the problem. E.g. "It's frustrating when..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen.

**Which user role is affected?**
- [ ] District Health Officer
- [ ] PHC Staff (ANM/Pharmacist)
- [ ] Citizen
- [ ] All roles

**Priority**
- [ ] Critical (blocking demo)
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low / Nice-to-have

**Additional context**
